summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification for five open PRs. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive items were detected, and no close, merge, label, or fix actions are recommended under this shard's permissions.

actions.reason: The PR is active draft maintainer work with unresolved review findings, so it should remain open and outside closeout for this inventory shard.
This is a plausible focused fix path for a hydrated memory issue, but the inventory job forbids merge/fix actions and does not authorize treating it as a cluster canonical.
The PR is not a duplicate or low-signal closeout candidate; proof/merge-readiness needs to be handled in its own PR review path.
This remains a focused open contributor fix candidate for a hydrated Windows QMD issue, but this inventory shard should not close the issue or merge the PR.
Even with low-signal-docs labels, this job does not allow low-signal PR closure, and the PR has passing docs checks plus a maintainer-review status.
